metadata.name: Prepare for an IRS Office Audit

description: A taxpayer has been selected for an office audit regarding their Schedule C business expenses.

nodes.task_description: Review the IRS audit notice to identify the specific items under examination.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the audit is focused on travel and meal expenses.

nodes.task_description: Gather all relevant documentation from the taxpayer, such as receipts, mileage logs, and bank statements.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent compiles a complete set of supporting documents.

nodes.task_description: Organize the documentation and prepare an audit file to present to the IRS agent.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a well-organized file that substantiates the expenses claimed.
